data.content: Plan needs revision: it updates knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts, but the app’s active screen uses getBackend() with auto-routing and can resolve beads repos to BdCliBackend, which delegates list filtering through src/lib/bd.ts. Without covering bd.ts, the user-facing active view remains inconsistent/incomplete on the default CLI path. Revise the plan to include the CLI filtering path and its test coverage, while preserving the ancestor-only expansion and terminal sibling exclusion cases.
